properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh our Lord and King Our praise to You we bring There is no other Rock but You Seated high above You are the One we love This is our song Of praise to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: King forever! You are the first And You're the last You are sovereign All Your commands Will always come to pass To give You glory

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who is like You Who else is worthy Of our praise We exalt You You reign in majesty And awesome splendour King forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Abba Father Your steadfast love Will never fail You are faithful You are God And I will worship In Your courts forever
